title: Bunch of 6 Large Colourfast Foam Roses! Wedding Craft Bridal Fake Silk Quality[Red]
features: These stunning colourfast foam roses are perfect for bridal work.
Available in a massive range of colours, you can be sure to find one to suit any theme.
Choose from one of two sizes and different quantities.
Each bunch contains 6 roses. Regular head diameter: 6cm, Large head diameter: 8cm
